h176da213g3ba2g48c3gaa05g088711a08486: Need any supplies? We've less mouths to feed since the gnolls jumped us.
h4747f92bgf3cfg4229gaa8bgb74017fca551: Two. Both stalwarts of Tyr, sworn to uphold justice.
hcecbb777g9e2bg4d7dg89c0g4ff3571535e7: I pray their souls have returned to Tyr's grace.
h957e7429g4313g4ba3gbfccg6b62c87e87d8: I... yes. I hope so too. Thank you.
hdeef376dg97b5g4482g9528g58d484f1b4a3: I'll take those supplies now - and everything else you own.
h99abcf5cg4ff9g44a8g8429g6562b302ad0f: Oh, you fool. We'll destroy you.
h459e1e30g288ag4cd9gaa33g5af2b820f622: You're lucky any of you survived against gnolls.
hb35603bega096g42d5gb759g70ed543b6ea2: Luck had nothing to do with it. This is our calling, and Tyr is watching over us.
h391363e9g0269g434agaf95g3dd34dcb03d6: Let's see what you have to trade.
h09b7e2ffg32b8g4a70g8e38g51ff9cee0e25: Sure, I'll take your supplies - and everything else you own.
h49297327g9f19g437dgbeadgdd5d4cd931a1: I'm still looking to shift some supplies. Don't have much to spare, but it's more than we can carry.
